name: AW Golf Detroit
about: AW Golf Detroit is an indoor golf training studio that utilizes TrackMan technology for year-round coaching. The facility is led by teaching professional Adam White, who offers customized one-on-one and paired lessons focused on building a swing tailored to each individual's body type and skill level. The indoor studio complements outdoor teaching at Belle Isle Golf, providing golfers with flexible options to improve their game through technical skills, mental approach, and equipment fitting, regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor training with premium TrackMan technology
Personalized coaching tailored to individual body types and swing mechanics
Flexible lesson options from one-on-one to paired sessions
Focus on mental game training in addition to technical skills
Convenient Detroit location with easy access for area golfers

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor used for indoor coaching and analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but as a training facility, it's recommended that you bring your own clubs for personalized fitting and swing analysis.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any food or drink services, but it does not specify if outside food and drink are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on typical simulation round times as it primarily focuses on coaching rather than public play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While the facility offers coaching, there is no specific information on junior programs or family-friendly amenities mentioned on the website.
